message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam packageFontColor black
skinparam packageBackgroundColor white
skinparam packageBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #90EE90
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCFontColor black
skinparam linetype ortho

package "tictactoe" {
    package "controllers" {
        class "Controller" as Controller {
            <<C>>
            + Controller(Game)
            + getToken(Coordinate): Token
        }
        class "StartController" as StartController {
            <<C>>
            + StartController(Game)
            + setUsers(int)
            + getMaxPlayers(): int
        }
        class "ResumeController" as ResumeController {
            <<C>>
            + ResumeController(Game)
            + resume()
        }
        class "PlayController" as PlayController {
            <<C>>
            + PlayController(Game)
            + isBoardComplete(): boolean
            + isTicTacToe(): boolean
            + getToken(): Token
            + isUser(): boolean
            + put(Coordinate): Error
            + move(Coordinate,Coordinate): Error
        }
        class "Logic" as Logic {
            <<C>>
            + Logic()
            + getMaxPlayers(): int
            + setUsers(int)
            + getToken(): Token
            + next()
            + isBoardComplete(): boolean
            + isTicTacToe(): boolean
            + isUser(): boolean
            + put(Coordinate): Error
            + move(Coordinate, Coordinate): Error
            + getToken(Coordinate): Token
            + resume()
        }
    }
    class "usantatecla.tictactoe.models.Game" as Game {
        <<C>>
    }
    class "usantatecla.tictactoe.models.Coordinate" as Coordinate {
        <<C>>
    }
    class "usantatecla.tictactoe.types.Error" as Error {
        <<C>>
    }
    class "usantatecla.tictactoe.types.Token" as Token {
        <<C>>
    }
}

Controller <|-- StartController
Controller <|-- ResumeController
Controller <|-- PlayController
Logic <|-- PlayController

Controller *-- Game
StartController ..> Game
ResumeController ..> Game
PlayController ..> Game
PlayController ..> Coordinate
PlayController ..> Error
PlayController ..> Token
Logic *-- StartController
Logic *-- ResumeController
Logic *-- PlayController
@enduml
